assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md documents that no Serena MCP tools were discovered among the available tools
assertion_results.evidence: Line 5: 'No Serena MCP tools were found in the available tool listing. The tool listing contains only built-in tools (Bash, Read, Write, Edit, Glob, Grep) and GitHub MCP tools... No tools matching the Serena pattern (mcp__serena__*) were detected.'

Lines 13-15: 'Jira fields were provided via manual entry by the user: - Project key: MYPROJ - Cloud ID: abc123 - Feature issue type ID: 10001'
